fetch_a_specific_arxiv_paper_by_id_and: Fetch a specific ArXiv paper by ID and produce a structured summary of its contribution, method, and results. Use to digest a single paper quickly.
integrates_arxiv_into_the_workflow_can_s: Integrates ArXiv into the workflow. Can search for papers, get paper details, and get author papers. Does not require OAuth or an API key.
retrieve_an_author_s_recent_arxiv_papers: Retrieve an author's recent ArXiv papers and report new work since the last check. Use to follow specific researchers or labs.
search_and_retrieve_academic_papers_from: Search and retrieve academic papers from ArXiv
search_arxiv_for_the_most_relevant_or_mo: Search ArXiv for the most relevant or most recent papers on a topic and return a ranked, summarized list. Use for literature discovery and topic scans.
search_arxiv_on_a_topic_summarize_the_ke: Search ArXiv on a topic, summarize the key papers, and assemble a themed literature review. Use to bootstrap research on a new area.
